'''âv-p-ng''' ('''kavapang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbite|unbite]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbite|unbite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-p-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kavapang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivapang|thivapang]] || [[word:jivapang|jivapang]] || [[word:shivapang|shivapang]] || [[word:kivapang|kivapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvapang|thuthuvapang]] || [[word:jujuvapang|jujuvapang]] || [[word:shushuvapang|shushuvapang]] || [[word:kukuvapang|kukuvapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvapang|thuvapang]] || [[word:juvapang|juvapang]] || [[word:shuvapang|shuvapang]] || [[word:kuvapang|kuvapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvapang|thuvapang]] || [[word:juvapang|juvapang]] || [[word:shuvapang|shuvapang]] || [[word:kuvapang|kuvapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevapang|thevapang]] || [[word:jevapang|jevapang]] || [[word:shevapang|shevapang]] || [[word:kevapang|kevapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovapang|thothovapang]] || [[word:jojovapang|jojovapang]] || [[word:shoshovapang|shoshovapang]] || [[word:kokovapang|kokovapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovapang|thovapang]] || [[word:jovapang|jovapang]] || [[word:shovapang|shovapang]] || [[word:kovapang|kovapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovapang|thovapang]] || [[word:jovapang|jovapang]] || [[word:shovapang|shovapang]] || [[word:kovapang|kovapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvapang|thĂŠvapang]] || [[word:jĂŠvapang|jĂŠvapang]] || [[word:shĂŠvapang|shĂŠvapang]] || [[word:kĂŠvapang|kĂŠvapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavapang|thathavapang]] || [[word:jajavapang|jajavapang]] || [[word:shashavapang|shashavapang]] || [[word:kakavapang|kakavapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavapang|thavapang]] || [[word:javapang|javapang]] || [[word:shavapang|shavapang]] || [[word:kavapang|kavapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavapang|thavapang]] || [[word:javapang|javapang]] || [[word:shavapang|shavapang]] || [[word:kavapang|kavapang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavapang|shavapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavapang|goshavapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavapang|gokishavapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavapangnĂŒ|shavapangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavapangnknĂŒ|goshavapangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapangnĂŒ|gokishavapangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavapangshĂ«|shavapangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavapangnkshĂ«|goshavapangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavapangshĂ«|gokishavapangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapangro|shavapangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapangnkro|goshavapangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapangro|gokishavapangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapangmu|shavapangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapangnkmu|goshavapangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapangmu|gokishavapangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavapangsher|shavapangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavapangnksher|goshavapangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavapangsher|gokishavapangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavapang|shavapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavapangnkng|goshavapangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavapang|gokishavapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavapangya|shavapangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavapangnkya|goshavapangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavapangya|gokishavapangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavapangyam|shavapangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavapangnkyam|goshavapangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavapangyam|gokishavapangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapangnĂŒshĂ«|shavapangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavapangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavapangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapangnĂŒro|shavapangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapangnknĂŒro|goshavapangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapangnĂŒro|gokishavapangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapangnĂŒmu|shavapangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapangnknĂŒmu|goshavapangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapangnĂŒmu|gokishavapangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapangshĂ«nĂŒ|shavapangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavapangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavapangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapangshĂ«ro|shavapangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapangnkshĂ«ro|goshavapangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapangshĂ«ro|gokishavapangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapangshĂ«mu|shavapangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapangnkshĂ«mu|goshavapangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapangshĂ«mu|gokishavapangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapangronĂŒ|shavapangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapangnkronĂŒ|goshavapangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapangronĂŒ|gokishavapangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapangroshĂ«|shavapangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapangnkroshĂ«|goshavapangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapangroshĂ«|gokishavapangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapangromu|shavapangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapangnkromu|goshavapangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapangromu|gokishavapangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapangmunĂŒ|shavapangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapangnkmunĂŒ|goshavapangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapangmunĂŒ|gokishavapangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapangmushĂ«|shavapangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapangnkmushĂ«|goshavapangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapangmushĂ«|gokishavapangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapangmuro|shavapangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapangnkmuro|goshavapangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapangmuro|gokishavapangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
